title: IsInSet
description: IsInSet: Condition that verifies if a value extracted from an object is included in the given set of values.

ValueSource.description: Object defining the source of a value to evaluate. IValueSource: Interface for objects defining how to extract a value from an object.

Set.description: Set of values for the extracted value to compare against.

ComparisonConfig.description: Options as per how the comparison is computed. ComparisonConfig: Settings to determine the uniqueness of an Object, i.e. when comparing and when computing the object Hash.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
